body_txt: There are three main versions of this trope, and it's an easy trope to get:    This makes the character appear more awesome with minimal effort on the part of both character and artist. Only the first one doesn't completely upset the mood and generally means the fight scene is ending or shifting to a different mood. The first one is generally a start of the fight move. The user gets extra points if their dodging causes the attacker to fall into harm. Part of The Law of Diminishing Defensive Effort ; if they stop being "nonchalant" you know that they're in trouble. It will often overlap with Excuse Me While I Multitask , Casual Danger Dialogue , or Strolling Through the Chaos . If you're going on the offensive after this trick, expect an Offhand Backhand to happen.
